failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id,
    pub.published_at,
    pub.url,
    pub.description
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
WHERE p.username = 'fluminensefc'
ORDER BY pub.published_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
failed_attempts.error:
